top_signals.title: Vitalik Buterin shares top priorities for new 'Lean Ethereum' strawmap
top_signals.summary: Part of the Ethereum Foundation’s plan to make Ethereum more private and scalable is to introduce a new virtual machine, with leanISA and RISC-V among the top candidates.

top_signals.title: Football may not come home but US investors will still cash cheques here
top_signals.summary: The US continues to invest in the English football pyramid. Matt Bonass gives his best shot at explaining why Football attracting money is not novel, but what has changed is the type of money, where the money has come from and the thinking behind it all.
